Empathy.bot_reaction: Thank you for your understanding. I’ll take note of that.
Empathy.explanation: There was a sense of empathy in your words. It’s wonderful that you’ve decided to try to understand how the other person feels.

Fact.explanation: You used fact(s) in your answer. This shows how mature you are.

Counter-speech.bot_reaction: Right, I got a bit carried away. Sorry.
Counter-speech.explanation: Wow, you spotted the hate in the comment. And you managed to put a stop to it in such a mature way!

Aggression.bot_reaction: Listen, you idi0t! Shut your mouth.
Aggression.explanation: Your comment came across as aggressive, which is why the person you were talking to replied in a rather rude manner.

Insult.bot_reaction: I'll report you to the police!
Insult.explanation: The person you were talking to felt that you had offended them, which is why they wrote that.

Sarcasm.bot_reaction: Go on, try joking with me again...
Sarcasm.explanation: There was a hint of sarcasm in your comment. Even though it was meant as a joke, it made the other person feel uncomfortable.

Ignoring.bot_reaction: I’m not a tissue for you to wipe yourself on and then throw away!
Ignoring.explanation: Your comment seemed to be ignoring the point. Ignoring things can be useful, but not always! There are times when you need to take notice and speak up.
